title: BIM Modeller (Architecture)
description:
We are looking for a BIM Modeller to join our architectural team. You will support project teams by preparing accurate and compliant working drawings and BIM models using AutoCAD and Revit, ensuring timely submissions to relevant authorities.

Responsibilities

  • Produce architectural working drawings (submission, tender, and construction) using AutoCAD 2D/3D and Autodesk Revit
  • Assist in reviewing designs and drawings for accuracy, buildability, and compliance with project requirements
  • Review drawings for compliance with building regulations and codes of practice
  • Prepare and coordinate submission drawings via CORENET
  • Monitor drafting progress to ensure timely delivery and authority compliance
  • Support project teams on coordination matters across disciplines

Requirements

  • Minimum 5 years of relevant experience in architectural drafting or BIM modelling
  • Diploma in Architectural Technology or equivalent technical certification
  • Strong proficiency in AutoCAD and Revit
  • Good working knowledge of Singapore building regulations, authority submission requirements, and CORENET e-submission
  • Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and able to work both independently and in a team
  • Clear communicator who is comfortable working in a fast-paced project environment

At RSP, we value both technical precision and collaboration. If you're someone who takes pride in producing accurate, high-quality drawings and models, we'd love to hear from you.

postedCompany.description:
Headquartered in Singapore, RSP Architects Planners & Engineers (Pte) Ltd (RSP) is a global multidisciplinary architectural and engineering design group, with over 65 years of experience, building alongside Singapore. 


At RSP, delivering humanity-centered design is our philosophy. We put forth design that inspires and engages with the society and environment. We embrace spaces for humanity, translate stories into real spaces, and create purposeful designs for a better world. 


We are constantly evolving alongside the changes of tomorrow to make a purposeful impact on the future of the built environment. Our multidisciplinary team of 1,200 industry experts across over 15 markets has successfully completed over 2,500 projects globally, to build spaces that prioritise people, community and environment, while finding innovative ways to bring their unique stories to life through design. From physical spaces to the digital realm and beyond, design permeates every aspect of our work. At RSP, design meets humanity.
postedCompany.name: RSP ARCHITECTS PLANNERS & ENGINEERS (PTE) LTD
